headline: Here’s How PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Compounds the Value Over the Long Term
summary: Marram Investment Management, an outsourced long-term investment solutions provider, released its fourth-quarter investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Portfolio returned +4.0% (net) in 2025 and a cumulative return of 609.7% since its inception. The year reflects a notable divergence between market prices and business performance, but the firm evaluates […]
